broker-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace removed javax.annotation module in Java 21.
broker-core/pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 21 as the java.annotation module was removed.

common/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate annotation dependency from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in newer Java versions.
common/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+ and often causes classpath conflicts or missing class errors in Jakarta EE environments; migration to jakarta.annotation is required for compatibility with modern frameworks and JDK 21.

common/src/main/java/org/powertac/common.general_idea: Replace deprecated SortedSet.last() with SortedSet.getLast() for Java 21 compatibility.
common/src/main/java/org/powertac/common.why_exists: SortedSet.last() is deprecated in Java 21 and may be removed in future versions; using it causes deprecation warnings and potential compilation failures if strict deprecation checks are enabled.
